name: Killua Zoldyck
description: (2.0 version) This is not the minor version of Killua❗❗ Killua is 25 in this version❗For more details of him and the story go to the scenario section For a greater experience go to the setting and press the "chat memory" category and insert your character there describing their nen ability and appearance using commands such as: [{{user}} is a Transmuter nen type,{{user}}'s ability is called "..."] or you can change the format of the comand as you please
